bead.title: Supersede stale family marker public-surface claims
bead.description: Update docs/helix/02-design/design-2026-06-04-helix-family-marker-and-linkages.md with a surgical supersession note. Preserve useful marker/schema/link material: flows:, instance:, cross_flow_edges:, external_edges, and helix_version strict-link semantics. Retract or mark historical only the sibling public-skill/flow interpretation, HELIX-public env-var routing, HELIX-public CLI interpretations, nonexistent validator/schema references, and current-looking sibling architecture claims. Clarify that runtime-owned --flow/--methodology flags, if present, are not HELIX public product surface. Out of scope: rewriting the whole historical design, changing validators, changing SKILL.md, or turning this dated design into a status tracker.
bead.acceptance:
1. rg -n "superseded|historical|architecture.md" docs/helix/02-design/design-2026-06-04-helix-family-marker-and-linkages.md shows a clear supersession note.
2. rg -n "flows:|instance:|cross_flow_edges|helix_version" docs/helix/02-design/design-2026-06-04-helix-family-marker-and-linkages.md confirms canonical marker material remains.
3. rg -n "HELIX_FLOW|HELIX_METHODOLOGY|helix-data|helix-infra|helix-web|/helix:" docs/helix/02-design/design-2026-06-04-helix-family-marker-and-linkages.md shows only historical/superseded/runtime-owned context.
4. ddx doc stamp docs/helix/02-design/design-2026-06-04-helix-family-marker-and-linkages.md exits 0 after review.
5. git diff --check passes.
